Article Title: SRH’s IPL 2026 plans shaken as key all-rounder ruled out following Pat Cummins’ injury
Article Text:
Sunrisers Hyderabad (PTI Photo)

Watch IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain

Poll Do you think the absence of Jack Edwards will significantly impact Sunrisers Hyderabad's performance in IPL 2026? Yes, a major impact No, they will manage

Sunrisers Hyderabad will be without Australian all-rounder Jack Edwards for the entire IPL 2026 season. The 25-year-old New South Wales cricketer, who secured his maiden IPL deal worth Rs 3 crore at this year’s auction, has been ruled out due to an injury, Cricbuzz reported on Thursday. The specifics of the injury have not been disclosed.Edwards earned his IPL contract after a strong all-round display for Australia A in a three-match ODI series against India A last year. He made his T20I debut for Australia on January 29, 2026, against Pakistan at Lahore’s Gaddafi Stadium under captain Travis Head, scoring five runs from six balls at No. 8 and finishing with figures of 0 for 25 in two overs.Australian pacer Nathan Ellis and England all-rounder Sam Curran will also miss the season. Ellis’ absence is a major blow for Chennai Super Kings, who were relying on him as a key bowler after parting ways with Sri Lankan pacer Matheesha Pathirana.Meanwhile, Rajasthan Royals will feel the loss of Curran, who joined the Jaipur-based franchise last year in a trade deal that involved Ravindra Jadeja and Sanju Samson. Ellis is sidelined with a hamstring injury, while Curran is out due to a groin problem.With Pat Cummins still recovering from a back injury, Ishan Kishan will lead Sunrisers Hyderabad in their opening matches, with Abhishek Sharma acting as his deputy. SRH begin their IPL 2026 campaign against defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on March 28. Their second fixture is an away game against Kolkata Knight Riders on April 2, before returning home to face Lucknow Super Giants on April 5.
Article Summary: Jack Edwards ruled out of IPL 2026 with an injury. Nathan Ellis and Sam Curran will also miss the season. Ishan Kishan will lead Sunrisers Hyderabad in their opening matches. SRH begin their campaign against defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

Article Title: Mohsin Naqvi’s PCB termed ‘weak’, accused of ‘kneeling before players’
Article Text:
Pakistan's Interior Minister and Chairman of Pakistan Cricket Board Mohsin Naqvi and head coach Mike Hesson (AP Photo/Anjum Naveed)

Watch EXCLUSIVE: Rahul Dravid on iconic Eden Gardens win against Australia in 2001 EXCLUSIVE: Rahul Dravid on iconic Eden Gardens win against Australia in 2001

Pakistan cricket’s recurring pattern of hype followed by disappointment and backlash has resurfaced once again after another underwhelming run. An early exit from the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 at the Super Eight stage was followed by a 1-2 ODI series loss in Bangladesh, triggering sharp criticism from former opener Ahmed Shehzad Shehzad’s remarks were not limited to selection debates or leadership questions. Instead, he targeted what he believes is a deeper structural issue within the Pakistan Cricket Board. According to him, the board spent years promoting a select group of players as the faces of both the national team and the Pakistan Super League , only to find itself struggling when results began to decline.“The calibre of your players is not at that level, which was built up as a baran by the Pakistan Cricket Board for the Pakistan Super League (PSL) 5 and 7 years ago.These 6-8 boys they are also the face of the PSL. They are also the face of our Pakistan team. Will they change Pakistan’s desitny?” Ahmed Shehzad questioned in a video posted on his YouTube channel.He further accused the board of heavily backing this core group through endorsements, leadership roles, and financial support, while failing to ensure accountability.“You provided all the sponsorships to those boys, endorsed them, and invested money in them.You have them captaincies in the PSL, right? You made them the thumb of the Pakistan team. You handed over the entire Pakistan cricket team to those 6 boys and their agents. And what have they done now? The fire they have lit in the jungle, the fun and parties they have had, the pockets they have filled, the enjoyment they have had, they haven’t given Pakistan any wins by doing so,” Shehzad said.His criticism reflects a long-standing concern around Pakistan cricket’s approach, where certain players are repeatedly elevated as central figures without consistent results to justify that backing. Shehzad argued that the issue is not just performance but the lack of responsibility shown by the players.“Such is the audacity that even today, they are ready to admit that we are responsible. Not a single one of those players. Even today, they play the blame game. Even today, their ego is such that it isn’t breaking. So weak is the Pakistan Cricket Board now,” he added.He also questioned the board’s authority, suggesting it has lost control over the very players it empowered.“Whenever you talk about any player, they start spinning stories. I have never seen the Pakistan Cricket Board this weak in my life, as weak as this PCB is. They have power, right? But in their decision-making, they appear to be kneeling before their players. This PCB can’t do anything. The work they were supposed to do - bringing in new faces - they didn’t. What they do is, after every event, they try to pull a new trick, but the public has now caught their pattern,” he said.For Shehzad, the issue goes far beyond a single series defeat or tournament exit. He believes Pakistan cricket is grappling with a larger systemic problem, where star-making has taken precedence over renewal and accountability, leaving the team stuck in a cycle it has struggled to break.
Article Summary: Pakistan cricket’s recurring pattern of hype followed by disappointment and backlash has resurfaced once again after another underwhelming run. An early exit from the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 at the Super Eight stage was followed by a 1-2 ODI series loss in Bangladesh. Former opener Ahmed Shehzad has targeted what he believes is a deeper structural issue within the Pakistan Cricket Board.

Article Title: Auston Matthews Injury Update: NHL injury update: Auston Matthews to undergo surgery for Grade 3 MCL injury recovery, possibly to appear next season on time
Article Text:
Auston Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion on the knee-on-knee play with Radko Gudas (Image via Imagn Images)

NHL analyst predicts that Auston Matthews might undergo surgery after his brutal knee-on-knee hit

The Toronto Maple Leafs have received a crucial injury update on captain Auston Matthews following his collision with Radko Gudas, with possibilities of surgery based on the severity of the injury. The star player is currently facing a significant recovery process after suffering a serious knee injury following a brutal collision with Radko Gudas, raising concerns about his availability and long-term health.Radko Gudas’ knee-on-knee hit ended the Toronto Maple Leafs captain’s season and resulted in only a five-game suspension. Reports suggest Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion following the collision.The team later confirmed that his medical recommendations indicate that he will not return to play in the final stretch of the calendar. Toronto Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews will probably undergo surgery as part of his recovery from his severe Grade 3 MCL injury sustained in a brutal collision with Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas during an NHL match. This was stated by NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman, who stated that surgery is likely part of the plan moving forward.Speaking on Matthews’ health update, Friedman stated, “We’ll see when it happens, but it sounds like surgery will be part of Auston Matthews’ recovery. There is still plenty of confidence he will start next season on time.” He is also of the opinion that, despite the severity of the injury, the player will appear next season on time.Earlier, following the incident, the NHL’s Department of Player Safety imposed a five-game suspension on the Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas. According to reports, he will forfeit $104,166.65 in salary during the suspension.Due to this misconduct and the NHL’s decision, several players, including the head coach of the Leafs, Craig Berube, have voiced their opinion on the five-game suspension imposed on Gudas. Berube shared his strong dissatisfaction with the NHL's five-game suspension handed to the Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas. He opposed the misconduct and called the hit a “dirty play.”The injury has sidelined Matthews, and the team has confirmed that, after his knee injury, he will not return to play in the final stretch of the calendar.Meanwhile, Matthews prolonged absence from the club has fueled speculation about the captain's future with Toronto, indicating trade moves. However, these are mere speculations, and no such trade decision has been confirmed so far by the club.
Article Summary: NHL analyst predicts that Auston Matthews might undergo surgery after his brutal knee-on-knee hit with Radko Gudas. Reports suggest Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion following the collision. The team later confirmed that his medical recommendations indicate that he will not return to play in the final stretch of the calendar.

Article Title: Cardi B: Did Stefon Diggs get kicked out by Cardi B’s security? Viral arena drama explained
Article Text:
Stefon Diggs, Cardi B (Getty Images)

Stefon Diggs and Cardi B back in headlines as arena rumor takes over the internet



"It wasn't a shouting match at first,"

"But the vibe shifted the second Cardi noticed who was trying to get through the door.

She wasn't having it."

The internet is currently in a tailspin over a late-night incident involving NFL star Stefon Diggs and rap icon Cardi B . While mainstream outlets remain silent, unverified sources and social media "eye-witnesses" are painting a picture of a high-stakes confrontation that allegedly took place at the T-Mobile Arena.According to whispers circulating on gossip blogs, the tension between the former power couple reached a breaking point during a recent event. Sources claim that Diggs, flanked by a small group of friends, attempted to gain access to Cardi B’s private suite to discuss matters regarding their newborn son.one alleged bystander posted.The rumor suggests that Cardi B didn't hesitate, immediately signaling her personal security team. Within minutes, venue security reportedly intervened. The narrative being pushed is that Diggs, recently a free agent after his stint with the Patriots, was firmly escorted from the premises alongside his associates.As juicy as this sounds, we have to keep our feet on the ground. Here’s why we’re taking this with a grain of salt: In an era where everyone has a smartphone, there is a suspicious lack of video showing a 6-foot-tall NFL star being dragged out of a major arena.Following their messy split around Super Bowl LX, both stars have been targets of "rage-bait" reporting designed to farm clicks from their massive fanbases. Neither T-Mobile Arena management nor the Las Vegas PD has confirmed a disturbance involving high-profile celebrities on the night in question. The breakup between Cardi B and Stefon Diggs wasn't just a quiet "we grew apart" situation, it was a high-velocity collision of NFL drama and hip-hop headlines.Cardi is currently on her "Little Miss Drama" tour, where she has explicitly stated she is single and free. While she defended Diggs against other rappers (like BIA) recently, the current vibe is "co-parenting from a distance" or in the case of the T-Mobile rumor, not co-parenting at all.Is Stefon Diggs in a messy custody battle? Absolutely. Did he get tossed out of an arena by Cardi B’s security? Likely fiction. It’s the kind of story that feels true because their real-life drama is so intense, but until we see the receipts (or a TMZ clip), it’s just another chapter in the internet’s favorite soap opera.
Article Summary: Stefon Diggs and Cardi B reportedly had a confrontation at the T-Mobile Arena. Sources claim Diggs tried to gain access to Cardi's private suite to discuss their newborn son. Cardi didn't hesitate, immediately signaling her personal security team, sources say.

Article Title: Aryna Sabalenka: Coco Gauff backs Aryna Sabalenka as world No. 1 threatens Dubai boycott over Salah Tahlak's criticism: "I completely understand"
Article Text:
Coco Gauff supports Aryna Sabalenka amid Dubai row over Salah Tahlak’s comments.Image: Getty

Coco Gauff defends Aryna Sabalenka amid Dubai exit controversy



Aryna Sabalenka’s decision to withdraw from the Dubai Tennis Championships is still making tennis news, and now Coco Gauff has stepped in with her take. The world number one pulled out of the event due to injury, but the reaction from tournament director Salah Tahlak turned it into a bigger talking point. That is why this story is getting attention now. Sabalenka was openly criticised and even faced calls for sanctions, something that did not sit well with players. With the Miami Open around the corner, Gauff has now shared her honest view on the situation, and it reflects what many in the tennis world are thinking.Speaking ahead of the Miami Open, Gauff made it clear she understands why Sabalenka was frustrated with the comments.She said, “I just feel Iga and Aryna have played that tournament so many times, and it wasn’t anything personal to it. It’s tough. We’re trying our best to play the calendar. I completely understand why she [Sabalenka] would feel like that because the comments were unnecessary.”Aryna Sabalenka had withdrawn just days before the tournament, joining Iga Swiatek in skipping the event. The criticism that followed led to a strong reaction from the Belarusian, who reportedly even considered not returning to Dubai in the future.Players are constantly dealing with injuries and a packed schedule, so it is not always easy to manage everything on the WTA Tour. Even with all the talk around the withdrawals, Gauff still had a strong run in Dubai. She came in as the third seed and made it to the semi-finals before losing to Elina Svitolina in a tight three-set match. Now, the focus shifts to Miami, where all three stars, Gauff, Sabalenka and Swiatek, are set to compete. Sabalenka will be looking to defend her 2025 title, while Gauff has her own story to change.Interestingly, Miami has not been her strongest tournament so far. Despite calling it a “bucket list tournament,” she has never gone beyond the fourth round. In fact, she has exited at that stage three times and holds a 57 percent win rate at the event. This year could be a chance to change that. Gauff will begin her campaign in the second round against either Darja Semeņistaja or Elisabetta Cocciaretto.For now, though, her comments add more weight to the Sabalenka controversy. And if the reaction is anything to go by, this conversation is far from over.
Article Summary: Coco Gauff supports Aryna Sabalenka amid Dubai exit controversy. World number one pulled out of the event due to injury. The reaction from tournament director Salah Tahlak turned it into a bigger talking point. Gauff will begin her campaign in the second round of the Miami Open. She has never gone beyond the fourth round at the event.

Article Title: Toronto Blue Jays: Connor Seabold suddenly enters Toronto Blue Jays plans as Yimi García injury chaos raises unexpected Opening Day bullpen twist
Article Text:
Connor Seabold (Image Via Getty)

Connor Seabold steps up as Yimi García injury leaves Toronto Blue Jays searching for bullpen solution

The Toronto Blue Jays are dealing with a problem just days before Opening Day. Their bullpen is not fully ready, and injuries have made things harder. But in the middle of all this, a new name is starting to stand out. Connor Seabold, who was not in the spotlight earlier, is now getting serious attention.The 30-year-old right-handed pitcher was signed in January for Triple-A Buffalo with a spring training invite. At that time, it looked like a simple depth move. Now, things have changed quickly. After strong performances in camp, Seabold is suddenly being seen as a real option for the main roster.Connor Seabold has impressed during spring training, and people around the team have noticed.In a Jays Digest video, Nick Gosse said, “I like seeing guys come up who aren’t really under-the-radar guys. He is a hidden gem.”Seabold’s numbers back that claim. His fastball speed has jumped from around 92 mph to nearly 96 mph, even touching 97. That is a big change. His whiff rate, which was under 22 percent last season, has now reached 46.8 percent in spring training. He also leads the Blue Jays camp with 13 strikeouts.What makes it more interesting is how he has improved his pitch mix. He added a new slider in the mid-80s, along with a strong changeup. Gosse explained, “He continued to develop himself, worked with Pete Walker, got his fastball ticked up, got a new slider, got some really good changeup.”His past record was not very strong. Last season, he split time between the Tampa Bay Rays and Atlanta Braves systems and had a 6.07 ERA in Triple-A. But his current form looks very different, and that is why the team is paying attention.At the same time, the Blue Jays are dealing with uncertainty around Yimi García. The 35-year-old reliever is coming back from right elbow surgery. He threw his first pitch of the season on March 14, but he is still not fully ready. The team has already confirmed he will not be part of the Opening Day roster.García said, “I feel good right now, I feel better than last season.” Still, the team is being careful with him. They are not rushing his return, especially because of his age and recent injury.There are more concerns as well. Pitchers like Ricky Tiedemann, Shane Bieber, and José Berríos are dealing with injuries. Bowden Francis is also out after surgery. With so many issues, the team needs someone reliable.That is where Seabold fits in. If he continues this form, he could play an important role early in the season. For now, he looks like a timely solution for a team that needs help.
Article Summary: Connor Seabold has impressed during spring training for the Toronto Blue Jays. The 30-year-old right-handed pitcher was signed in January for Triple-A Buffalo with a spring training invite. His fastball speed has jumped from around 92 mph to nearly 96 mph, even touching 97.

Article Title: Joe Burrow: Did Tom Brady warn Joe Burrow to stay away from Alix Earle after they were spotted together?
Article Text:
(Image via Getty Images)

Tom Brady humiliates Joe Burrow with savage “Wildcat” jab after Alix Earle drama



“I know what you did last Sunday,”

"That's what they called Joe the other night at those Oscars parties ..

the Wildcat, At least he's here, no fashion shows to attend to."

This is the "Battle of the Quarterbacks" nobody saw coming, and honestly? The scriptwriters for the 2026 NFL offseason deserve an Emmy. We’ve got the GOAT, the Golden Boy, and the Internet’s favorite "Hot Mess" all tangled up in a web of Oscars after-parties and flag football shade.If you haven’t been refreshing your feed, here is the absolute tea on why Tom Brady and Joe Burrow are currently the pettiest rivals in sports.It all started on Sunday night at the Vanity Fair Oscars party. Joe Burrow, fresh off his breakup with long-time girlfriend Olivia Holzmacher and clearly enjoying his "Single Joe" era was spotted leaving the bash in a black SUV. The passenger list? Pop star Tate McRae and, most importantly, Alix Earle.Now, normally, Joe grabbing a ride with an influencer wouldn't be a national emergency. But Alix Earle has been the rumored "discreet" companion of one Tom Brady since Super Bowl weekend. They’ve been spotted everywhere from Miami to San Francisco, and while they haven't gone "Instagram official," the veteran QB has reportedly been very protective of their "situationship."Fast forward to Wednesday night at the Fanatics Flag Football Draft.Brady and Burrow were on stage together, and the tension was thick enough to cut with a championship ring. When it was time to talk strategy, Brady didn’t just talk shop, he went for the jugular.With a smirk that screamedBrady leaned into the mic and referred to Burrow as "The Wildcat." It seemed like a nod to Joe’s flag football team name, but Brady followed it up with a pointed jab:The crowd went silent. Burrow’s reaction? A stone-cold side-eye that has already been turned into a thousand memes. Brady is the 48-year-old legend trying to maintain his "cool" status. Burrow is the 29-year-old heartthrob who is currently the most eligible bachelor in the league. Brady famously hates his private life being a spectacle. By getting into a car with Alix Earle in front of a wall of paparazzi, Burrow basically blew up Brady’s spot.They are literally facing off this Saturday, March 21, in the Flag Football Classic. Brady is captaining "Team Founders," and Burrow is leading "Team Wildcats."Whether Joe was actually "scouting" Alix or just hitching a ride, Brady clearly took it as a personal foul. We’re looking at a classic case of the veteran marking his turf against the young gun.
Article Summary: Tom Brady humiliated Joe Burrow with savage “Wildcat” jab after Alix Earle drama. Brady is captaining "Team Founders," and Burrow is leading "Team Wildcats" Burrow's reaction? A stone-cold side-eye that has already been turned into a thousand memes.

Article Title: Luka Dončić Custody Battle: What’s going on between Luka Dončić and Anamaria Goltes? Custody battle explained
Article Text:
Luka Doncic and Anamaria Goltes. Image via: Anamaria Goltes/ Instagram

Luka Dončić’s custody case explained as legal fight stretches from California to Slovenia



Gabriela (Born Nov 2023): Born in the United States.



Olivia (Born Dec 2025): Born in Slovenia.



The Daily Mail

NBA superstar Luka Dončić and his longtime partner, Anamaria Goltes, are currently locked in a high-profile legal dispute over their two daughters. After years of being one of the league’s most stable couples, the pair has separated, sparking a complex international custody battle that spans from California to Slovenia.The relationship reportedly hit a breaking point during the current 2025–2026 NBA season. On March 10, 2026, Dončić officially confirmed that he and Goltes had ended their engagement. According to sources close to the Dallas Mavericks star, the primary reason for the split was the distance between him and his children. Since the start of the season, Luka has reportedly only spent a total of two days with his daughters.The situation is complicated because the two children were born in different countries, which creates a legal "tug-of-war" between U.S. and Slovenian law:In February 2026, Dončić filed an interim injunction in a Slovenian court. This is a legal move to force Anamaria to allow him visitation rights. Luka’s legal team argues that the children are being "withheld" from him. Meanwhile, Goltes has filed her own legal petition in California, seeking child support and coverage for her legal fees.According to reports from, Goltes is currently living in Slovenia. She is reportedly staying at a luxury mansion owned by Luka’s mother, Mirjam Poterbin.The separation has been tense. In December 2025, shortly after the birth of their second daughter, police were reportedly called to a hospital in Kranj, Slovenia, following a heated disagreement between the couple. While no arrests were made, it signaled the beginning of their public legal fallout.For Luka, the focus remains on the courts; he is seeking a formal schedule that allows him to be an active father while fulfilling his professional duties in the NBA.The case is ongoing. Because the children have different citizenships and residences, the courts must decide which country has "jurisdiction" (the power to make the final decision) over their future. For now, the "Golden Couple" of Slovenia is headed for a long and difficult legal road.
Article Summary: Luka Dončić and Anamaria Goltes are locked in a legal dispute over their two daughters. The two children were born in different countries, which creates a legal "tug-of-war" between U.S. and Slovenian law.

Article Title: Conor Mcaneney: What went wrong with Conor McAneney as Florida State kicker arrest and suspension spark major concern
Article Text:
Conor McAneney (Image Via Getty)

Conor McAneney arrest details and Florida state suspension after fort lauderdale incident

Florida State football is dealing with sudden trouble just before the new season build-up. Sophomore kicker Conor McAneney was arrested early Wednesday morning in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The incident happened during Spring Break, a time when many college athletes travel, but this situation quickly turned serious. According to TMZ Sports, police said the situation started as a trespassing issue near the well-known Elbo Room Beach Bar.But things did not stay calm for long. Officers said the moment they tried to take McAneney into custody, he became aggressive. That moment changed everything and led to multiple charges.As per Fort Lauderdale Police, McAneney was arrested around 2:30 AM. He now faces charges of battery on a law enforcement officer, resisting with violence, and trespassing. The case has already drawn attention, especially after his mugshot went public showing visible injuries on his face.The details from the police report, shared through TMZ Sports, explain how the situation escalated. Officers said Conor McAneney did not cooperate during the arrest.Instead, he allegedly turned violent while they were trying to control the situation. This led to the additional and more serious charge of battery on an officer.His mugshot quickly became a talking point online. In the image, McAneney is seen with a swollen lip and marks on his face. While police have not clearly explained how those injuries happened, the image suggests there was some physical struggle during the incident.At the moment, McAneney is still in custody. There is no confirmed update on when he will appear before a judge. This leaves his immediate future uncertain, both legally and in terms of his football career.Florida State University has already taken action. A spokesperson from the athletic department told TMZ Sports, “He has been suspended indefinitely from all team activities.” This means he will not be part of the team until further notice, and the program will likely wait for more clarity on the legal process.Looking at his background, McAneney came to Florida State after starting his college career at Quincy University in Illinois. During his freshman season, he played 11 games and made seven out of ten field goal attempts. His longest kick was 45 yards. He was still building his place in the team, but this incident has now paused that progress.For now, the focus remains on how the case moves forward. The legal outcome will play a big role in deciding what happens next for Conor McAneney and his future with Florida State football.
Article Summary: Conor McAneney was arrested early Wednesday morning in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. He now faces charges of battery on a law enforcement officer, resisting with violence, and trespassing. Florida State University has already taken action, suspending him indefinitely.

Article Title: Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos’ relationship reportedly took a turn for the worse in January, days before they canceled their Lake Como wedding
Article Text:
Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos’ relationship reportedly took a turn for the worse in January, days before they canceled their Lake Como wedding.(Image via Getty Images)

Things between Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly changed in January

What happened in the joint bachelor and bachelorette parties of Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos?



Dak Prescott, the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, and his ex fiancee, Sarah Jane Ramos, had billions of fans waiting for them to tie the knot.Throughout the last three years, both Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos seemed deeply in love with each other but now, their lavish Lake Como wedding has been canceled. While it has sparked shockwaves across the league, it seems the two had a serious conversation about it in January.A few hours ago, as per Page Six, a source has revealed that the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, Dak Prescott, and Sarah Jane Ramos had a serious conversation in January 2026 wherein she asked him to mend his ways.As per reports, Sarah Jane Ramos was aware of the fact that she was being cheated on as Dak Prescott was in contact with multiple women and ex flings through social media.But it was only in January 2026, when the two got serious about their future together, that Sarah Jane Ramos gave him a “monogamous ultimatum”.While that must have been the end of the alleged infidelity, it seems Dak Prescott continued to send inappropriate messages to multiple women even after their conversation.Over the last few days, various sources have revealed that as Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos celebrated their joint bachelor and bachelorette parties in the Bahamas, she allegedly caught him cheating through an alternative social media account.This reportedly turned into a big argument and Sarah Jane Ramos was the one who canceled their lavish, multi million dollar Lake Como wedding which was supposed to be held on 10th April.As per reports, hours after canceling their wedding, it was Sarah Jane Ramos who sent mails to their 250 guests informing them of the unfortunate decision.However, both the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, Dak Prescott, and Sarah Jane Ramos have stayed silent about the cheating allegations.It can be safe to say that the star player’s fans were not expecting such news since the popular quarterback, Dak Prescott, has always presented himself as a pretty happy family man.Over the last few years, the Dallas Cowboys’ star player has often spoken about how happy he is in his life with Sarah Jane Ramos and their two daughters, Margaret and Aurora Rayne.
Article Summary: Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos’ relationship reportedly took a turn for the worse in January, days before they canceled their Lake Como wedding. The two had a serious conversation in January 2026 wherein she asked him to mend his ways. As per reports, Dak Prescott continued to send inappropriate messages to multiple women even after their conversation.

Article Title: ‘Better than yesterday’: Chahal reveals lifestyle changes to improve form
Article Text:
Yuzvendra Chahal (Getty Images)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Ajit Agarkar knocks BCCI door, makes a huge extension request | World Cup Ajit Agarkar knocks BCCI door, makes a huge extension request | World Cup

CHANDIGARH: As the countdown to the new IPL season begins, Yuzvendra Chahal has struck a candid note, both about his team Punjab Kings’ ambitions and his own resurgence. After what he admits was a tough previous year marked by injuries and illness, the leg-spinner is entering the season with renewed purpose. Having battled health setbacks, Chahal revealed that the time away from cricket tested him both mentally and physically.“Last year wasn’t easy,” Chahal said during the team’s jersey launch event in Mohali. “With the support of my family, friends and the Punjab management, I’ve come through it. I’m feeling much healthier now.”In a conscious effort to rebuild himself, Chahal has made lifestyle changes that underline his commitment to peak performance.He has given up alcohol, focused on better sleep, improved his diet and committed himself to consistent gym work. “I want to keep improving every year,” he added. “I may not promise specific results but I’ll give everything I have, on and off the field.”This phase also represents a mental reset for Chahal. “This is about being better than yesterday,” he said. “Helping youngsters, supporting teammates and giving my best.That’s what matters.” For Punjab Kings, last season was one of promise that fell just short. Chahal echoed that sentiment. “We played great cricket but missed it in the final moments,” he said. “This year, we’re more confident. The core group is intact, the atmosphere is positive and everyone is coming in with good form. ”The team has already begun preparations with a 12-day camp in the coming days, aiming to finetune strategies and adapt to unpredictable home conditions.Despite being regarded as the lead spinner, Chahal was quick to emphasise collective strength over individual roles. “There’s no ‘main’ spinner. Wickets come through teamwork. Everyone contributes.”
Article Summary: Yuzvendra Chahal has spoken out about the new IPL season. The leg-spinner is entering the season with renewed purpose. He has made lifestyle changes that underline his commitment to peak performance. Punjab Kings have already begun preparations with a 12-day camp.

Article Title: ‘Stay off social media’: Riyan Parag’s advice to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

‘Stay off social media’

JAIPUR: The Rajasthan Royals team is in the throes of transition, with the long-time captain-coach combine of Sanju Samson and Rahul Dravid now gone for good, replaced by the young new skipper Riyan Parag and head coach Kumar Sangakkara . Uncertain times lie ahead but the franchise is hoping the drastic change will reverse its fortunes.Having already seen several ups and downs in his short career, Riyan has matured enough to acknowledge the huge contribution of his predecessor Samson, who was traded to CSK prior to the season. Riyan, 24, the youngest captain in IPL-2026, admitted that he would be personally missing his “Sanju bhaiya” and his exit has created a big void that cannot be easily filled. Addressing the media in a pre-season press conference here on Thursday, Riyan compared the departure of Samson with ‘RoKo’.“If you talk about Sanju Bhaiya, we never think about replacing the kind of player he is. We can perhaps look for someone with a similar skill-set or have someone bat in his position. It’s like there is no replacement for Virat Kohli or Rohit Sharma . In the same way, there is no replacement for Sanju bhaiya because he is such a good player,” said Riyan.The newly-appointed RR captain wants batting prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to enjoy his game without being burdened by “additional pressure”. “As a captain my message to him would be to not do a lot of press conferences or follow a lot of social media. He’s playing really well and he’s going to make the country proud. He should continue to play his natural game,” said Riyan, adding that the 14-year-old Sooryavanshi will pair up with fellow southpaw Yashasvi Jaiswal at the top of the order.“My only message for Vaibhav is if the first ball is meant to be hit, hit it. There’s no issue in that. I don’t think any young player has done what he has over the last one year. I’m sure he’ll form a formidable opening combo with Yashasvi,” added Riyan.The Royals had a frustrating last season, crashing to 10 defeats to finish ninth in the 10-team standings. Riyan wants to start afresh. “This year, the focus is to plan better and finish games, which we couldn’t do in the previous edition.”
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals team is in the throes of transition, with the long-time captain-coach combine of Sanju Samson and Rahul Dravid now gone for good. The young new skipper Riyan Parag and head coach Kumar Sangakkara are hoping to reverse its fortunes.

Article Title: Lockie Ferguson to miss IPL 2026 start, puts family first: 'Help my wife out'
Article Text:
Lockie Ferguson (PTI Photo/Shailendra Bhojak)

Watch Shashi Tharoor & Samson’s Redemption Story: From Setbacks to Glory Shashi Tharoor & Samson’s Redemption Story: From Setbacks to Glory

Commitment to New Zealand and future goals

NEW DELHI: Lockie Ferguson will miss the early part of IPL 2026 as he chooses to spend time with his family after recently becoming a father. The fast bowler, who plays for Punjab Kings, is expected to join the squad later in the tournament after taking a short break from cricket.Ferguson explained his decision. "Just had a wee son, trying to spend as much time as I can at home and help my wife out," he said ahead of the 3rd T20I against New Zealand, as quoted by ESPNCricinfo. "I'll have a few weeks off after this, before sort of heading to the later stages of the IPL and away for the winter."He had earlier taken only a brief break during the T20 World Cup 2026, spending just a few days with his family before returning to play.Now, he wants a longer rest to balance personal life and cricket.Ferguson said he still enjoys representing the New Zealand national cricket team, adding, "Always a pleasure playing for the Black Caps, really enjoyed my time in India with the group again."In his absence, Punjab Kings may turn to players like Ben Dwarshuis, along with other pace options in their squad.Ferguson made it clear he is not stepping away from international cricket.He said, "They thought this was my last game (laughs). No, I'm still very committed to play for New Zealand."Looking ahead, he is focused on upcoming global tournaments and added, "Looking forward to the next two World Cups, there's a great opportunity for our squad."He also mentioned working hard to stay fit and contribute to the team.On the growth of cricket, Ferguson supported the idea of a franchise T20 league in New Zealand, saying, "I think it's exciting that there's a prospect at a franchise tournament," and highlighted the country’s talent and potential to showcase its cricket on a bigger stage.
Article Summary: Lockie Ferguson will miss the early part of IPL 2026 as he chooses to spend time with his family after recently becoming a father. The fast bowler, who plays for Punjab Kings, is expected to join the squad later in the tournament after taking a short break from cricket. Ferguson made it clear he is not stepping away from international cricket.

Article Title: LSG owner fuels speculation with 'output counts' post; fans ask 'Rahul ke liye ya Pant?'
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

Watch IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain

A few days before the start of the IPL 2026 season, Sanjiv Goenka, owner of Lucknow Super Giants (LSG), shared a message on social media that drew attention online."I measure people by the results they deliver, not by the hours they sit behind a desk without delivering. Output is the only honest metric," Goenka said in a post on X.The post did not mention any individual, but several users linked it to former LSG captain KL Rahul , who is no longer part of the franchise setup, while some linked it to current LSG captain Rishabh Pant."Ye pant ke liye tha ki kl rahul ke liye," asked a user."Dig at Rishabh Pant?" wondered another.The timing of the post comes close to the new IPL season, where LSG will begin with a changed squad composition.Goenka and Rahul were earlier involved in a heated moment during IPL 2024 that had drawn attention. After a match, visuals showed Goenka in an animated conversation with Rahul on the field, which led to discussion around the team environment and leadership. Rahul later moved on from the franchise ahead of the last season. KL Rahul will play for Delhi Capitals (DC) in IPL 2026.There has been no confirmation linking the recent post to any player.LSG will begin their IPL 2026 season on April 1 against Delhi Capitals. In 2025, they finished seventh in the points table. The team is still looking for their first IPL trophy and will aim for a strong and consistent performance this season.The BCCI has announced that the first phase of IPL 2026 will take place from March 28 to April 12.
Article Summary: Sanjiv Goenka, owner of Lucknow Super Giants (LSG), shared a message on social media. The post did not mention any individual, but several users linked it to former LSG captain KL Rahul. There has been no confirmation linking the recent post to any player.

Article Title: Nathan Ellis ruled out as CSK suffer massive blow: What next?
Article Text:
Nathan Ellis (PTI Photo/R Senthil Kumar) (

Watch Ajit Agarkar knocks BCCI door, makes a huge extension request | World Cup Ajit Agarkar knocks BCCI door, makes a huge extension request | World Cup

Injury blow before season start

What this means for CSK

NEW DELHI: Five-time IPL champions Chennai Super Kings have been dealt a major setback just before the new season, with Australian fast bowler Nathan Ellis ruled out due to a hamstring injury.He was expected to play a key role in leading the team’s pace attack, especially since Matheesha Pathirana is no longer part of the squad.Ellis, who had been picked up for Rs 2 crore and retained ahead of the season, brought valuable experience with 19 wickets from 17 IPL matches.His absence now leaves a gap in the bowling lineup that the team will need to address quickly.A franchise official confirmed the news. "Yes, he is out. We have not yet decided on the replacement," the offical told PTI.So far, the team management has not named a replacement, adding some uncertainty just days before the tournament begins.Led by Ruturaj Gaikwad , Chennai will now have to rethink their bowling plans and possibly rely on other players to step up. The team is set to kick off their campaign against Rajasthan Royals on March 30 in Guwahati.Despite the setback, CSK will hope to quickly adjust and stay competitive as they aim for another strong IPL season.
Article Summary: Australian fast bowler Nathan Ellis ruled out due to a hamstring injury. Ellis was expected to play a key role in leading the team’s pace attack. CSK kick off their campaign against Rajasthan Royals on March 30 in Guwahati.

Article Title: Iran to play FIFA World Cup but 'boycott' US amid Donald Trump's 'safety' warning
Article Text:
Iran's players pose for a team photo at Azadi Stadium in Tehran, Iran (left) and US President Donald Trump receives the FIFA Peace Prize from FIFA president Gianni Infantino in Washington, Friday, Dec. 5, 2025. (AP Photo)

Iran Football Federation president Mehdi Taj said Iran will take part in the upcoming FIFA World Cup but intends to boycott the United States amid ongoing tensions."We will be preparing for the World Cup. We will boycott the United States but not the World Cup," Taj said in a video released by the Iranian press agency Fars News Agency on Wednesday, as cited by news agency AFP.Iran are currently scheduled to play their group-stage matches in the United States. However, the federation has started discussions with FIFA about the possibility of shifting those fixtures to another venue. FIFA has so far said that the tournament schedule remains unchanged.Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum said on Tuesday that Mexico is ready to host Iran’s group matches if required. "Yes," she said when asked about the possibility."Mexico maintains diplomatic relations with every country in the world, therefore we will wait to see what FIFA decides."Iran’s participation in the tournament, which will be held across the United States, Canada and Mexico, has come under focus since the conflict in the Middle East began last month. US President Donald Trump had earlier warned that the safety of Iranian players could be at risk if they travelled to the United States.Gianni Infantino had initially said that assurances were received from Trump that the Iranian team would be allowed to participate. Iran are scheduled to face New Zealand and Belgium in Los Angeles, followed by a match against Egypt in Seattle.However, Trump later said that Iran’s team should not travel to the tournament "for their own life and safety", drawing strong reactions. Iran responded by stating that "no one can exclude Iran's national team from the World Cup".Iran had qualified for the tournament almost a year ago after topping their group, becoming the second Asian side after Japan to secure a place.The team’s base camp for the tournament is currently planned in Tucson, Arizona.Meanwhile, Abolfazl Pasandideh criticised "the US government's lack of cooperation regarding visa issuance and the provision of logistical support" for the Iranian delegation in a statement released on Monday.If Iran eventually withdraws from the tournament, it is not yet known which team would replace them.
Article Summary: Iran Football Federation president Mehdi Taj says Iran will take part in the upcoming FIFA World Cup but intends to boycott the United States. US President Donald Trump had earlier warned that the safety of Iranian players could be at risk if they travelled to the U.S.

Article Title: Lionel Messi scripts history, betters Ronaldo to become fastest ever to 900 goals
Article Text: Lionel Messi scripts history, betters Ronaldo to become fastest ever to 900 goals
